aboutIDent.bannerSub: International standard dental system specializing in Implants
aboutIDent.mainTitle: I-DENT DENTAL — INTERNATIONAL STANDARD DENTAL SYSTEM
aboutIDent.intro1: I-Dent Dental is an international standard dental system with deep expertise in dental implants, founded by Dr. Nguyen Hieu Tung, PhD — who trained for over 10 years in France in the field of dental implantology.
aboutIDent.intro2: With the mission of providing high-quality dental services that meet European standards for Vietnamese people, I-Dent Dental has served over 10,000 patients domestically and internationally, especially the overseas Vietnamese community across many countries.
aboutIDent.visionDesc: To become the leading dental system in Vietnam meeting international standards
aboutIDent.missionDesc: Delivering perfect smiles with French-standard technology and treatment quality
aboutIDent.commitmentDesc: 100% European materials and equipment, international standard procedures
aboutIDent.why1Desc: 10 years of research and in-depth practice in Implantology at leading French hospitals
aboutIDent.why2Desc: 100% equipment and materials transferred directly from Europe and the USA
aboutIDent.why3Desc: Honored by the Vietnam Anti-Counterfeiting and Brand Protection Association
aboutIDent.why4Desc: Domestic patients and overseas Vietnamese from many countries worldwide

implantService.bannerSub: French Technology Implants — PhD Doctor with 10 years training in France
implantService.whatIsDesc: Dental implant is the most advanced tooth replacement technique available today. The doctor will place a Titanium implant post into the jawbone to replace the missing tooth root, then attach a porcelain crown on top to restore aesthetics and chewing function.
implantService.adv1: PhD Doctor with 10 years of specialized training in France directly performs treatment
implantService.adv2: 100% implant posts and materials imported from Europe (France, Switzerland, Germany)
implantService.adv3: French-standard implant procedure ensuring absolute safety
implantService.adv4: CT Cone Beam 3D technology for precise surgical planning
implantService.step1Desc: 3D CT scan, jawbone assessment, detailed treatment planning
implantService.step2Desc: Microsurgery to place the implant post into the jawbone
implantService.step3Desc: Wait 3-6 months for the implant to fully integrate with the jawbone
implantService.step4Desc: Attach the porcelain crown, restoring aesthetics and chewing function
implantService.priceNote: * Prices above do not include porcelain crown. Contact hotline 094 1818 616 for detailed consultation.
implantService.sidebarConsult: Get consultation from PhD Implant specialist

ceramicService.bannerSub: Perfect smile with premium imported porcelain
ceramicService.whatIsDesc: Dental crown (also known as porcelain cap) is a cosmetic dental restoration method where the doctor shaves down the natural tooth and covers it with a porcelain crown that has a natural shape, size and color.
ceramicService.typesTitle: TYPES OF DENTAL CROWNS AT I-DENT
ceramicService.type1: Zirconia Crown — Durable, beautiful, no dark gum line
ceramicService.type2: E.max Crown — High aesthetics, naturally translucent

bracesService.bannerSub: Confident smile with perfectly aligned teeth
bracesService.whatIsDesc: Orthodontics is a method that uses dental appliances to move teeth to the correct position on the dental arch, creating straight teeth, proper bite alignment and a more balanced face.
bracesService.method1: Metal Braces — Traditional method, highly effective
bracesService.method2: Ceramic Braces — More aesthetic, less visible brackets
bracesService.method3: Self-Ligating Braces — Less pain, shorter treatment time
bracesService.method4: Invisalign Clear Aligners — Nearly invisible, easily removable
bracesService.sidebarDesc: Get advice on the right method for you
